Liver:RelicFruit.NAME: Blue Fruit Gift Box
Liver:RelicFruit.FLAVOR: Juicy and delicious, a common food source—though these fruits are actually insect pupae.
DESCRIPTIONS: Start combat with a #bblue fruit in hand.

Liver:RelicFruit2.NAME: Deluxe Blue Fruit Box
Liver:RelicFruit2.FLAVOR: Limited deluxe edition, essential for slugcats on the go.
DESCRIPTIONS: Replace #gBlue #gFruit #gGift #gBox . Start combat with a #bblue #bfruit+ in hand.

Liver:Tubularis.NAME: Straw
DESCRIPTIONS: On pickup, add two #gslime to deck. When slime exhausted, gain 1 #yfullness . Drawn slime costs 0.

Liver:BoneSpear.NAME: Bone Spear
Liver:BoneSpear.FLAVOR: Biting isn't the only way to eat.
DESCRIPTIONS: #yspear cards heal 1 #yfullness when dealing unblocked damage.

Liver:LongLegMushroom.NAME: Leggy Mushroom Chunk
DESCRIPTIONS: Turn start: if #yfullness full, gain [E] . Excess fullness deals equal damage to all.

Liver:BatteryEnergy.NAME: Mass-Dilution Battery
Liver:BatteryEnergy.FLAVOR: I beg you: bring this battery far east, to a friend... if she still lives.
DESCRIPTIONS: Turn start: gain [E] . After taking 8 hits in combat, deal 40 damage to all, then this relic breaks.

Liver:FlowerAgain.NAME: Samsara Flower
DESCRIPTIONS: When losing karma in combat, gain a karma flower (potion). Once per combat.

Liver:BirdMask.NAME: Vulture King Mask
Liver:BirdMask.FLAVOR: Weak creatures fear this shadow from above.
DESCRIPTIONS: When blocking, gain 1 nimble.

Liver:SleepPotions.NAME: Sleeping Pills
DESCRIPTIONS: Normal hibernation costs 3 fullness, no longer interrupted by attacks. NL When resting, increase max karma by 1.

Liver:GrassJuice.NAME: Blazing Blood
Liver:GrassJuice.FLAVOR: Wounds from red lizard leader won't heal.
DESCRIPTIONS: #yrainworld:trauma no longer decreases per turn, and traumatized enemies gain +1 #yrainworld:trauma when attacking.

Liver:WhiteSkin.NAME: White Lizard Skin
Liver:WhiteSkin.FLAVOR: Remains briefly active after removal. Nobody cares what happened to its owner.
DESCRIPTIONS: Right-click to activate, consume [E] , gain 1 intangible. NL (Once per combat)
Not enough energy.
No uses left.

Liver:TalkSign.NAME: Communication Mark
Liver:TalkSign.FLAVOR: You understand the language of gods.
DESCRIPTIONS: On pickup: max karma +1.

Liver:MoonSkin.NAME: Moon Cloak
Liver:MoonSkin.FLAVOR: Hanging on a pole east of the submerged superstructure.
DESCRIPTIONS: When reviving, gain 20 block.

Liver:Eternal.NAME: Eternity
DESCRIPTIONS: Max karma becomes 10. Some cards gain special effects.

RedCat:CorruptCatalyst.NAME: Red Mushroom Chunk
RedCat:CorruptCatalyst.FLAVOR: It's color is as crimson as fate.
DESCRIPTIONS: Replace your Cat Punch and Cat Defense with Corrupt Strike and Corrupt Shell.

RedCat:Pearl.NAME: Graffiti Board
RedCat:Pearl.FLAVOR: A weathered fragment of a wall carved with symbols of an ancient civilization.
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain 1 #yStrength for every 10 #yVitality accumulated.

RedCat:Yoyo.NAME: Yoyo
RedCat:Yoyo.FLAVOR: It is said that in another world, yoyos can also be used to attack people.
DESCRIPTIONS: The 1st Skill or Attack card played each turn returns to hand #y.

RedCat:Menu.NAME: Hunter's Notes
RedCat:Menu.FLAVOR: All the names in the notes have been crossed out.
DESCRIPTIONS: Start combat by applying #b2 stacks of #yPrey Mark to a random enemy. NL Increase karma by 1 after killing #b4 enemies with #yPrey Mark.

RedCat:Menu2.NAME: Hunter's Notes II
RedCat:Menu2.FLAVOR: Such a variety of delicacies would make a glutton cry!
DESCRIPTIONS: Replace #gHunter's Notes . Start combat by applying #b3 stacks of #yPrey Mark to all enemies. NL Increase karma by 1 after killing #b3 enemies with #yPrey Mark.

RedCat:RecoverKey.NAME: Waste Respawn Key
RedCat:RecoverKey.FLAVOR: A green neuron containing several fragments of residual state reset codes.
DESCRIPTIONS: Has a special effect in certain events.

RedCat:mushroom.NAME: Corruption Mark
DESCRIPTIONS: Hibernation costs #r9 fullness, and gain #b5 #yCorruption at the start of combat.
